commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ceffe0b6763f503e0446b15c97defdfa65faf437)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `writeUsageCostCacheLockAtomically` to fall back from `fs.promises.link()` to exclusive `writeFile(..., { flag: "wx" })` when the hard-link publish step returns `ENOTSUP`.

PR surface: Source +11. Total +11 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and `v2026.6.1` publish the usage-cost cache lock with `fs.promises.link` and only handle `EEXIST`, so unsupported-link errors escape the refresh path. I did not establish a live unsupported-filesystem reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the remaining blockers are canonical-branch selection and real-environment proof, not a repair ClawSweeper can supply from this read-only review.

target.title: fix(infra): fall back to exclusive create when hard links are unsupported
target.author: dwc1997
